name: f1-fantasy-api-data

scripts.deploy:aci: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-aci-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/aci/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/aci/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:runner: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-runner-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/runner/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/runner/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:scheduler: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-scheduler-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/scheduler/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:logicapps: npm run deploy:runner && npm run deploy:grant-runner-msi && npm run deploy:scheduler
scripts.deploy:aci-locked: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-aci-locked-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/aci-locked/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/aci-locked/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:runner-locked: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-runner-locked-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/runner-locked/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/runner-locked/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:scheduler-locked: az deployment group create --resource-group f1-fantazy-bot --name "api-data-scheduler-locked-${DEPLOYMENT_SUFFIX:-manual-$(date +%s)}" --template-file infra/scheduler-locked/azuredeploy.json --parameters @infra/scheduler-locked/azuredeploy.parameters.json --output none --only-show-errors
scripts.deploy:logicapps-locked: npm run deploy:runner-locked && npm run deploy:grant-runner-msi-locked && npm run deploy:scheduler-locked
scripts.deploy:locked: npm run deploy:aci-locked && npm run deploy:logicapps-locked

author: Doron Kilzi
description: Fetches F1 Fantasy league data via Playwright and saves to Azure Blob Storage
